context: Indie-pop broke through to the mainstream as Gotye and Fun. topped the charts with emotionally raw anthems. Carly Rae Jepsen's 'Call Me Maybe' became the year's inescapable earworm, while PSY's 'Gangnam Style' proved a viral YouTube moment could conquer the Billboard charts from halfway around the world.

tracks.title: Somebody That I Used to Know
We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together
